Uses of Package
javax.media.mscontrol.join

Packages that use javax.media.mscontrol.join
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.join An application joins media objects to establish media streams between them. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.vxml Capabilities to control VoiceXML dialogs that are delegated to the Media Server. 
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.join used by javax.media.mscontrol
JoinableStream.StreamType
          Can be audio, video, or message.
JoinException
           
 

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.join used by javax.media.mscontrol.join
Joinable
          A Joinable is suitable for media composition.
Joinable.Direction
          Indicates a direction for the media flow.
JoinableContainer
          A Joinable object that contains multiple streams.
JoinableStream
          A JoinableStream represents a media stream channel (or port), of a given type: audio, video, etc.
JoinableStream.StreamType
          Can be audio, video, or message.
JoinEvent
          This event is delivered to the application upon completion of an asynchronous join operation.
JoinEventListener
          An application must register a JoinEventListener to be notified of a joinInitiate completion.
JoinEventNotifier
          Characteristics of objects able to send JoinEvent's.
JoinException

Joinable
          A Joinable is suitable for media composition.
JoinableContainer
          A Joinable object that contains multiple streams.
JoinEventNotifier
          Characteristics of objects able to send JoinEvent's.

Classes in javax.media.mscontrol.join used by javax.media.mscontrol.vxml
Joinable
          A Joinable is suitable for media composition.
JoinableDialog
          Implements a high level of abstraction of media interaction, for example a voicexml script interpreter.
JoinEventNotifier
          Characteristics of objects able to send JoinEvent's.
